headline: Open USD Raises Competition in the Global Stablecoin Payments Market
summary: Mysten Labs, Polygon Labs, and OSL Group discuss Open USD, regional stablecoin adoption, local-currency coins, and blockchain settlement in 2026.

headline: V Stock: Where Compounding Could Take The Price
summary: Visa (V) trades at $360.57 per share on a $651.9B market cap and 29.3x trailing earnings. Under a conservative 3-year scenario, the math points to roughly 42% of upside. Revenue compounding does most of the work in our scenario. Here is the picture the math sits on top of.

headline: Mastercard (MA) Trails Market Despite Earnings Growth
summary: Giverny Capital Asset Management, LLC, an investment management company, recently published its second-quarter 2026 investor letter. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. The model portfolio returned 13.70% this quarter, compared to the S&P 500’s 15.20% return. YTD, the portfolio gained 5.89%, while the index increased by 10.21%. The long-term link between stock […]

headline: Circle Wants to Own Crypto’s Financial Stack, but Tether Still Owns the Dollar
summary: Circle builds a four-layer financial stack on Arc while Tether's $184 billion USDT keeps its grip on crypto's dollar.

headline: Seen™ by Snap Finance® Hits Milestone, Expands Role in Connecting Underserved Consumers to Responsible Credit
summary: SALT LAKE CITY, July 21, 2026--Seen, Snap Finance’s credit card brand, today announced a series of milestones: more than 250,000 Seen-branded Mastercard® accounts have been issued since its November 2023 soft launch, two new products have been introduced to help consumers establish or build credit, and Seen’s consumer-facing app has been recognized by the FinTech Breakthrough Awards as Financial Access Mobile App of the Year.
